context_for_next_testing_agent: All API 500 errors have been fixed. The main fixes were: 1) Response format changes in food.py and notifications.py (already done by main agent), 2) Return type annotation fixes in categories.py and food.py (fixed during testing). All endpoints now return proper status codes (200 for success, 401 for unauthorized).
